Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory913.jpg'}
{3: 'She doesn\'t really know when it started, but Lucia keeps having strange dreams.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMovieFilm.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory513.jpg'}
{3: 'In the dream, her vision drifts free from her body, floating over the world like a ghost.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory368.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Luna', 3: 'Decoration complete!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Lucia! Shall we start the party?', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Lucia! Don\'t come out! Take your sister upstairs!'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cgqz105.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cgqz103.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg612_1.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg612_2.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cgqz106.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg4801_23.jpg'}
{3: 'Lucia sees 【kuroname】 relentlessly chased by eerie shadows, body slowly dissolving, forced to turn away from the light and plunge into darkness.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab'}
{3: 'She watches as 【kuroname】 ascends this strange staircase, pushing onward all the way to the very top...'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1026.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{3: 'And Lucia, too, chases after 【kuroname】\'s retreating figure, climbing, falling, returning to the same starting point again and again.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySugorokuScreen02.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory970.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'In that bewildering, phantasmagoric haze, Lucia calls out; the dreadful crimson nightmare follows like a second shadow, swallowing every cherished soul around her.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg3002_28.jpg'}
{3: 'Her father\'s badge shatters. Her mother\'s face is blotted out. ', 17: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySugorokuScreen02.prefab'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '3'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Luna\'s voice elongates into a sharp wail, then silence.', 22: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMovieFilm.prefab'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1307.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'In her world, nothing is left but that retreating figure.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '—【kuroname】!!'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'She runs, stumbling, her lungs about to explode.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab'}
{3: 'At last, her fingers seize that arm—'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg3002_03.jpg'}
{3: 'Szzzt—'}
{3: 'No head turns. She is holding nothing but an "arm."'}
{3: 'It sears her palm, the break jagged and raw, splinters of bone thrusting out from torn sinew, blood pouring from the cross-section—'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake2Loop'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '【kuroname】...?'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront79.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{3: 'Like thrusting her hand into molten iron, the pain burrows from the surface of her skin straight into the bone. Her fingertips blister and shrivel, eaten through bit by bit.'}
{1: '1', 2: '<color=#ffffffff><size=50>She doesn\'t want to let go. She can\'t.</size></color>', 4: '50', 6: '1', 9: '3'}
{2: 'She doesn\'t want to let go. She can\'t.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory844.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '3'}
{3: 'The blood seems alive, crawling up her wrist, creeping into her sleeve, seeping into the creases of her skin—'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake2Loop'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake2Disable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory00.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.7', 5: '0.3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1137.jpg'}
{3: 'Her eyes snap open.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory00.png', 3: '0.7', 4: '0', 5: '1'}
{3: 'Sunlight slants through the window, sharp enough to make her squint. Her cheek rests against the cold desk; before her lie scattered documents and a pen that has rolled to the very edge.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory974.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory974.jpg'}
{3: '【kuroname】 stands outside the window, one hand braced against the frame, leaning slightly to peer inside. Morning light pours in from behind, casting a long shadow across the desk.'}
{2: 'Time to go. Late on day one and the instructor\'ll have your name noted down.', 3: '120'}
{3: 'She lingers in a daze for a moment, then exhales deeply, as though shedding a heavy weight.'}

{3: 'Lucia rubs her eyes, scrubbing away the paper creases imprinted on her cheek. Beyond the window, the sky is a flawless blue. Far off, Bifrost catches the morning sun and glints silver, its maintenance rigging already restored, every trace of impact erased.'}
{3: 'A full year has passed since that attack.'}
{2: 'All-nighter again?', 3: '129'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'You went on for way too long last night.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'One thrust vector model. Four different solutions. I had to spend half the night untangling them just to figure out which one was worth using.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You asked me to walk you through it... You could\'ve just said something.', 3: '135'}
{3: 'Lucia doesn\'t answer. She gets up, brushes the creases from her uniform, and snatches the textbooks off the desk, stuffing them into her bag with visible irritation.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'You\'re surprisingly dense sometimes.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She swings a leg over the sill and slips out through the window. Living on the first floor of the dorm, she\'s been treating this window like a door for a whole year now.'}
{3: '【kuroname】 watches her land, mouth opening as if to speak, but ends up saying nothing.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1489.jpg'}

{3: 'The two walk side by side toward the academic building. A thin morning mist still clings to F.O.S., and from the distant training grounds come the faint shouts of underclassmen already running their laps.'}
{3: 'Lucia keeps her earphones draped around her neck, not on her ears. When this habit changed, she can\'t quite say.'}
{3: 'What she does know is that ever since she started down this path with 【kuroname】, so much has begun to change.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'The subject list for next year\'s placement exam is out. You\'ve seen it?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'The Science Council\'s setting it this time.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You think it\'ll be tough?', 3: '161'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Difficult isn\'t the problem. I just want everything to go without a hitch.', 4: '1'}

{3: 'Lucia\'s overall scores have consistently placed her in the top ten of the first-class cadets, with combat and physical training firmly holding in the top three. Academic subjects aren\'t her strongest area, but her foundations are solid, and she\'s never once fallen below the safety line.'}
{3: '【kuroname】\'s strengths run in the opposite direction, and the two are often locked in a tug-of-war around the same ranking band.'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'The lunar base is expanding its second phase next year. Word is they\'re badly understaffed. If people with combat experience transfer in, it saves them a lot of time bringing everyone up to speed.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You want to serve at the lunar base?', 3: '169'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Well, F.O.S. didn\'t put us through all this just to pass exams.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'I want to go somewhere I\'m actually needed. Doesn\'t matter if it\'s the Moon, Mars, or even the frontlines on Earth—as long as I don\'t have to sit in this classroom.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Besides... Luna said she wants to see lunar soil.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She pauses for a beat, her voice softening just a little.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'She mentioned it on our last call. One of her classmates, whose parent works at the lunar base, brought back a small bottle. She\'s been wanting some ever since.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'If I\'m going, I might as well bring some back for her.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The two have barely rounded the corner of the academic building when the sound of arguing reaches them from up ahead.'}
{3: 'More precisely, a shrill voice and a clipped, rigid voice clashing back and forth.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'I told you! I got here first!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'Training ground access is determined by reservation timestamp, not physical arrival time.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'I was standing here at six in the morning!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'The terminal confirms I submitted my reservation at 5:57 AM.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'Who in their right mind makes a reservation at 5:57 in the morning?!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'Someone who shows up at six should understand someone who reserves at 5:57.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ophelia', 3: '...You said that on purpose, didn\'t you?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'I was only stating a fact.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'You absolute mule! Can you talk like a normal human being for once?!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Adelyde', 3: '...I believe everything I\'ve said complies with academy regulations.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'I swear, I\'m going to wring your neck.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'And they\'re at it again...', 3: '198'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'At least now they argue while walking side by side instead of shouting across the whole training ground.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Lucia and 【kuroname】 walk past them, tilting their heads slightly.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Morning.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hey, Ophelia, Adelyde. Morning.', 3: '204'}
{2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'Good morning.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'The two replies halt the argument in perfect, unexpected sync. Two seconds stretch by. And then—'}
{2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'I already let you use the training ground! Why are you still following me?!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'I\'m not following you. The equipment room is in this direction. Excessive sensitivity is a recognized psychological condition. I recommend...', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Lucia and 【kuroname】 shake their heads and keep walking.'}
{3: 'At the stairwell entrance of the academic building, a piercing wail spills out from a third-floor window.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Joanne', 3: '<size=50>I—can\'t—take—this—anymore—!!</size>', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'Ms. Cassandra!! Please, I\'m begging you. Leave!!', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'The comms lab requires absolute electromagnetic silence during signal calibration! Your mechanical arm is wrecking the readings!', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Cassandra', 3: 'Wrecking? Darling, I\'m only sitting here and observing. Practically a statue.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Joanne', 3: 'You are NOT! That... that arm of yours is spraying data fragrance every other second! My spectrum analyzer is completely flooded with your signal!', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Cassandra', 3: 'Oh? Then this arm is performing rather magnificently, isn\'t it?', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Joanne', 3: 'That is NOT something to be proud of in a lab!!', 4: '18'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1493.jpg', 2: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Joanne leans out of the third-floor window, hair a bird\'s nest, glasses askew, her face the picture of despair.'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'Lucia—【kuroname】—save me—!', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'She showed up at the crack of dawn, insisting on "inspecting teaching outcomes"! All my calibration data is ruined!', 4: '11'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Lucia doesn\'t slow her steps, only casting Joanne a look of pity.'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'Hey! You\'re just going to leave me here to die?!', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Sorry, Joanne... We\'ll be late.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'Wait, wait—!', 4: '11'}
{3: 'Joanne pulls back inside, and a racket of banging and clattering erupts. She\'s likely wrestling to reclaim something from Cassandra\'s grasp.'}
{2: '...We\'re really not helping?', 3: '250'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Last time we stepped in to stop Cassandra\'s cosmic ray hair-dye project, it landed us a three-thousand-word written reflection.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Sorry, Joanne.', 3: '254'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory3.jpg'}
{1: 'This was how they spent their days, and how they will go on spending them in the year to come.', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Time moves like a steady, unhurried river, carrying along the mundane routines and the growth that has crept in unnoticed.'}

{1: 'After the attack, the academy tightened its security protocols, and the Bifrost\'s defenses underwent two full rounds of reinforcement. The first-year cadets were no longer treated as merely students. They began rotating into active security duties across Aerospace City, standing guard, patrolling shoulder to shoulder with soldiers on duty.'}
{1: 'Some have matured along the way. Some have grown silent. Some didn\'t really change. Lucia and 【kuroname】 fall squarely into the last group.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory101.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory101.png'}

{1: 'She still isn\'t much of a talker. Her earphones still sit around her neck. But she has stopped eating by herself. Somewhere along the way, that corner table in the cafeteria went from holding one person to two, and then to five.', 5: '1'}

{1: 'Lucia sits at the very end, 【kuroname】 beside her, Joanne across. Ophelia and Adelyde flank either side—there\'s still at least a seat\'s worth of distance between them, but far less than when they first arrived at the academy.', 6: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1489.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1489.jpg'}
{1: 'They attend classes together, train together, and go on missions together.', 5: '2'}

{1: 'They get hurled around together in zero-gravity sim pods, endure three straight days of downpour during wilderness survival training, and get chewed out together by the instructors during combat evaluations.'}
{1: 'They volunteer as test subjects for Joanne\'s experiments, circulate ads for Ophelia\'s family business, and learn to sail alongside Adelyde.'}

{1: 'And on the occasional mission-free dusk, they lie together in the vast shadow beneath Bifrost, watching the clouds drift slowly overhead, stealing laughs as they tease Cassandra about her galaxy-rendingly disastrous fashion sense.'}
{1: 'They cry, they laugh, they burn out, they savor. Every last piece of it belongs to that most beautiful stretch of youth, the kind meant only for the young.', 6: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory147.png'}
{1: 'The night before the placement exam.', 5: '2'}
{1: 'June 15th.'}
{1: 'The study room holds only a scattered handful of students, most buried in their final reviews.', 5: '1'}

{1: 'A tense, stifling atmosphere hangs over everything. Tomorrow\'s results will decide where each of them spends the coming year: the lunar military base, a planetary observation station, the Cosmos Technicians Union... or remaining behind on campus.'}
{1: 'Lucia sits by the window, an orbital mechanics review book laid open in front of her, headphones on and volume cranked to maximum.'}
{1: 'Because F.O.S.\'s campus broadcast system is currently spewing something utterly indescribable—', 7: '1'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Cassandra', 3: 'Good evening, darlings! It\'s time for your evening music broadcast! Today\'s selection is a genuine masterpiece, freshly composed by your illustrious trustee, using a mere one ten-thousandth of her genius and a precious fifteen minutes of her afternoon!', 4: '18'}

{3: 'An indescribable torrent of electronic beats pours from the speakers. The bass booms like muffled thunder, the melody veering wildly across bizarre frequencies, punctuated now and then by what might be a human moan, or just a synthesizer shorting out.'}
{3: 'The entire academic building is suffering under the assault.'}

{1: '1', 3: 'Beneath the desk, Lucia\'s right leg is jittering faster and faster. Her pen has already punched several holes through her notebook. Her face remains impassive, but a vein at her temple is slowly, visibly beginning to throb.'}
{3: 'Across the table, 【kuroname】 puts down the pen, checks the time on the terminal, and discreetly fires off a message to some group chat.'}
{2: '...Want to get some air?', 3: '292'}
{2: 'Back hill. It\'s quiet.', 3: '295'}
{3: 'With a small jerk of the chin, 【kuroname】 gestures toward the window. A year ago, the two of them had flown over that very place in a plane on the verge of falling apart.'}
{2: 'Let\'s take your motorbike. I\'ll ride this time.', 3: '298'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Lucia\'s right leg stops. She pulls off her earphones and looks at 【kuroname】.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...You can ride now?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You taught me before.', 3: '302'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'I taught you once. You crashed three times.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I tried again later on my own. Didn\'t crash.', 3: '305'}
{3: 'She closes her notebook.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1390.jpg'}

{3: 'The hill behind F.O.S. is not much of a climb, just a gentle slope on the outskirts of Aerospace City, strewn with sparse tropical brush. There are no streetlights here, and few ever bother to come.'}
{3: 'From the top, the whole of Aerospace City unfolds below. Bifrost\'s lights climb from the ground straight into the clouds, a pillar of radiance driven into the night.'}
{3: 'The motorcycle rests beside a low, scrawny tree at the hilltop, its engine ticking softly as it cools.'}
{3: 'The two of them sit on the grass, legs crossed, shoulders pressed lightly together.'}
{3: 'The stars above are fierce and bright. So near the equator, with no light pollution to dim them, the Milky Way sprawls across the vault of heaven like a pale river of light.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Lucia tips her head back, watching the boundless, ink-dark sky. She stays silent for a long, long moment.'}
{2: 'The exam\'s coming up. Are you nervous?', 3: '323'}
{2: 'But you\'ve been pulling up grass this whole time...', 3: '325'}
{3: 'Lucia glances down. Sure enough, a small patch of the tender green grass beside her hand has been plucked clean.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...You talk too much.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Frowning, she gives 【kuroname】 a pointed jab.'}
{2: 'I\'m just saying what I see...', 3: '332', 4: 'Ow, ow...', 5: '332'}
{3: 'A breeze drifts up from the foot of the hill, carrying the dry, crisp scent of evaporated liquid oxygen. It\'s a smell unique to Aerospace City, one that follows you wherever you go.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Lucia smooths back a strand of silver hair lifted by the light wind and turns her head.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'After all this is over... what do you want to do first?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You mean the exam?', 3: '338'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'I mean after we graduate. When we leave F.O.S.', 4: '1'}
{3: '【kuroname】 lowers gaze, taking a moment to think.'}
{2: 'Wherever this world needs me most, I guess.', 3: '342'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: '...What does that mean?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Maybe some corner of Earth where the Unification War\'s still going.', 3: '345'}
{2: 'Or the Moon, or Mars...', 3: '346'}
{2: 'The Copernicus Outpost is expanding. I heard they\'re badly understaffed.', 3: '347'}
{2: 'Oh, and after graduation, the Zero-point Reactor should be almost done too.', 3: '348'}
{2: 'That could work. The Science Council will definitely need hands.', 3: '349'}
{2: 'Basically... I\'ll just go wherever I\'m needed.', 3: '350'}
{3: 'Lucia rests her chin in her hand, offering no response.'}
{2: 'What about you, Lucia?', 3: '353'}
{2: 'After we graduate, what do you want to do first?', 3: '355'}
{3: 'She tilts her head, giving it genuine thought for a moment.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Same as you, I suppose.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Yeah. I want to go somewhere higher, where I can protect more people.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She still pulls at the grass, her gaze fixed on the light atop Bifrost.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...When I was little, I used to have this strange dream.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'I\'d fall into this thick fog. People all around me, but they\'d vanish one by one. I\'d just stand there, reaching out... but I couldn\'t hold on to anyone.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Every time I woke up, I couldn\'t remember a thing. Just... my palms would feel hot. Like I\'d forgotten something important.', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Ever since then, I wanted to get stronger. To protect Luna, to protect my parents. And as I grew older, I wanted to reach higher and protect more people. Like... the heroes in those cartoons.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'That\'s why I came to F.O.S.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She snaps another blade of grass, her eyes fixed on the toes of her shoes.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'There are so many people in this world fighting for the same cause. That makes me want to be at the very front. To stand before all of them.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'For a brief moment, 【kuroname】 says nothing, simply following her gaze out toward the distant sky.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...You\'re gonna laugh, aren\'t you?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Lucia\'s fingers tighten unconsciously. She deliberately turns her head away, refusing to look at 【kuroname】.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...Then why are you so quiet?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Because... I feel the same way.', 3: '381'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...The same way?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Not a dream exactly, but sometimes... I feel like something\'s pushing me forward.', 3: '384'}
{2: 'Like there\'s someone, something... or a voice from somewhere far away, always urging me to keep going.', 3: '385'}
{2: 'Like it\'s from another world, maybe. I can\'t explain it. But it\'s always been there.', 3: '386'}
{3: 'Lucia studies 【kuroname】. The dark hides every expression, leaving only a silhouette and the faint glint of stars reflected in those eyes.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'In some ways, we really are alike.', 4: '1'}
{3: '【kuroname】 smiles gently.'}
{2: 'After we graduate, you want to stick with me as my teammate?', 3: '392'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Teammate?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I always think we make a good team.', 3: '394', 4: 'If we fight side by side, I know we\'ll be unstoppable.', 5: '396'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'So that\'s what you\'ve been thinking about...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...Of course you\'ll be unstoppable when someone\'s always had your back.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She smiles, but then, as if something drifts across her thoughts, the motion stills.'}
{3: 'Lifting her head to the sea of stars above, Lucia turns over that distant, yet achingly real, future in her mind.'}
{3: 'She thinks for a moment, lips parting as if to speak—'}
{3: 'When a low, resonant rumble rolls in from the distance.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg6501_49.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{3: 'Orange-red flames erupt from the nozzles on Bifrost\'s launch pad, their glare setting half the night sky ablaze.'}
{3: 'A rocket rises—slowly at first, then gathering speed—piercing the clouds with a long tail of fire, like a star being born alight.'}
{3: 'Both of them look up at once. In their eyes, the trail stretches into a single burning line, reaching from the edge of the horizon all the way into the deepest vault of the sky.'}
{3: 'Lucia watches for a long, long time before she finally opens her mouth.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg6501_49.jpg', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'My life\'s changed a lot since I met you.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Having to deal with all these people. Being dragged into group activities. Squeezing around a cafeteria table with four others, two of whom never stop bickering.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'My schedule got more regular. I have training partners now. And someone stays after class to review lessons with me... even if their explanations do drag on a bit.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She pulls up another handful of grass, eyes lingering on the flames as they slowly dissipate into the distance, entirely unaware of the soft rustling stirring in the grass beside her.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'It\'s a hassle. Exhausting, way too loud, but I...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Turn around.', 3: '425'}
{3: 'She turns. In the darkness, three figures are standing on the other side of the hilltop.'}

{1: '1', 3: 'Joanne holds up a crooked piece of cardboard with both hands. Someone has scrawled a few large words across it in marker. The letters are uneven, sloppy, clearly thrown together in a rush on the way here.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Ophelia stands beside her, hands planted on her hips, her expression somewhere between smug and awkward, like she\'s fighting hard to keep a straight face.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Adelyde stands rigidly upright on the far right, clutching a bag of still-deflated balloons she hasn\'t managed to blow up yet.'}
{3: 'And then, all together, they draw in a deep, synchronized breath—'}
{2: 'Joanne & Ophelia & Adelyde', 3: '<size=50>HAPPY BIRTHDAY!!</size>', 4: '15', 5: '2', 6: '3'}

{3: 'The shout comes in pieces, a stagger of voices. Joanne bellows loudest of all. Ophelia chimes in a half-second late. Adelyde delivers at a carefully measured volume, neither overly enthusiastic nor entirely indifferent.'}
{3: 'Caught off guard, Lucia turns to look at 【kuroname】.'}
{3: 'At some point, 【kuroname】 has risen to stand, holding a modest cake with a few candles planted in it, their tiny flames flickering unsteadily in the night breeze.'}
{2: 'June 15th. You said you forgot last year, too.', 3: '450'}
{3: 'Lucia opens her mouth, instinctively ready to protest, but no words come. With practiced restraint, she settles for silence.'}
{3: 'She really did forget her own birthday. She always forgets it. Yet someone always remembers it for her.'}
{3: 'Back then, it was Dad, Mom, and Luna.'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Joanne', 3: 'Ophelia and I made the cake together! It took us two tries to get it right! The first time, she set the oven to some weird unit, somewhere between Celsius and Fahrenheit, I think...', 4: '15'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'Shut it! Do you have to say all that?!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'Ahem! Anyway, it turned out great!', 4: '15'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'Hold on. You tasted it?', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'I couldn\'t help myself when it came out of the oven! Just a tiny bite!', 4: '15'}
{2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'Your "tiny bite" removed an entire chunk from the side.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'That\'s why I turned that side toward the back...', 4: '15'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.3'}

{1: '1', 3: 'In the next moment, everyone swarms around Lucia in a jumble of overlapping voices. Ophelia doesn\'t bother asking; she just stuffs a crumpled party hat straight into 【kuroname】\'s hands.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'Hehe. 【kuroname】, put it on her!', 4: '18', 5: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.3'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Lower your head.', 3: '488'}
{3: 'Before Lucia can even react, 【kuroname】 has already settled the little ["crown"] onto her head.'}
{3: 'The party hat sits crooked, its elastic strap pinching her ear, not exactly comfortable.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}

{3: 'Joanne has her terminal out, snapping photos, the flash strobing bright. Ophelia stands beside her, calling out angles. Adelyde is trying to inflate the bag of balloons but clearly struggling; she\'s made three attempts already and still hasn\'t managed to tie a single one off.'}

{3: 'Lucia stands in the middle of them all, a crooked hat perched on her head, a cake with a chunk missing in front of her, and behind her, the rocket\'s last trail of exhaust still climbing through the night sky.'}
{3: 'She can\'t tell if she\'s happy or if she just feels too miserable, but her nose prickles all the same.'}
{2: 'Make a wish, Lucia.', 3: '505'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory769.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.3'}
{3: 'Lucia looks down at the candles trembling in the wind. Their flames dance in her eyes, small, but very bright.'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory769.jpg', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg6501_47.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryHuiyisha01.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'I hope... you live a life filled with happiness, Lucia.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryHuiyisha01.prefab'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0'}
{1: '1004', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront12.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1390.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: '(I wish those strange dreams would never come true.)', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '(I wish Mom\'s wish for me would come true. Please make it come true.)', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory961.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1004', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront12.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}

{3: 'The candle flames shiver in the night breeze, mirrored in her eyes. Small, yet impossibly bright. Far away, the lights of Bifrost climb from the earth all the way into the clouds, where they blur seamlessly into the stars overhead.'}
{1: '1004', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront12.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory961.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: '(Everyone would find their way to tomorrow, safe and happy.)', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Her wishes are more for others than for herself.'}
{3: 'Because when it comes to "Lucia\'s" own wishes and happiness, those, she has the resolve to make happen on her own.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySlowlyCloseEye.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySlowlyCloseEye.prefab'}
{3: 'She closes her eyes, silent for a few seconds—'}
{3: 'Then she blows out every candle in a single breath.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1390.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Joanne', 3: 'So? So? What\'s your wish?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Not telling. It won\'t come true if I do.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Joanne', 3: 'Aww, you\'re no fun... Fine, fine. Anyway, placement exam! Everyone feeling confident?', 4: '15'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'Hmph. What kind of question is that? I\'ll ace every single subject. Obviously.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Adelyde', 3: 'You placed third in Materials Engineering last time. Behind Lucia and 【kuroname】.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Ophelia', 3: 'Shut up, shut up, shut up—', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Joanne', 3: 'If only they\'d skip the fitness test... sigh...', 4: '15'}
{3: 'Lucia cuts a slice of cake and passes it to 【kuroname】, then cuts four more, handing them out one by one.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'We\'ll get through it.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Her voice comes out soft, as if meant for everyone to hear, yet also for herself.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'After placements, whether it\'s the moon or staying on the surface...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She glances up at the sky, her eyes following the rocket\'s trail as it slowly dissolves.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Either way, we\'ll all see each other again one day.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'On the hill behind F.O.S., five young people sit gathered around a handful of candles and a less-than-perfect cake, wrapped in the academy\'s night.'}
{3: 'In the distance, Bifrost blazes with light, the rocket\'s exhaust trail long since vanished into the sweep of the Milky Way.'}
{3: 'The wind scatters the candle smoke, threading the air with the sweetness of cream.'}
{3: 'The evening breeze rolls across the grassy hillside, catching their laughter and carrying it far, far away, so far it feels like even the stars might hear.'}
